hero.title: Hair that looks good the week after, too
hero.subtitle: Cuts, color, and styling done with care and honest advice. We take the time to understand what suits your hair, not just what's trending.
hero.imageAlt: Stylist working in a bright salon interior

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: From a quick trim to a full color change.

items.title: Cuts & styling
items.description: Consultation, wash, cut, and blow-dry. We cut for your hair type and how much time you actually have in the morning.

items.title: Color & balayage
items.description: Full color, highlights, and balayage with brands we trust. We'll tell you honestly what your hair can handle in one visit.

items.title: Treatments
items.description: Repair and hydration treatments for damaged or color-treated hair, matched to what your hair needs right now.

items.title: Occasions
items.description: Updos and styling for weddings and events. Book a trial run a week or two before the day.

about.title: About the studio
about.subtitle: A small salon where nobody rushes you out the door.
about.body: Mila opened the studio in 2013 after a decade of working in larger salons. The idea was simple: fewer chairs, more time per client, and honest advice even when it means recommending less work, not more. Most clients have been coming for years — and bringing their friends.
about.imageAlt: Portrait of Mila in the salon

features.title: Why clients stay
features.subtitle: The small things that make the difference.

items.title: Honest consultations
items.description: If a color change would wreck your hair, we'll say so and suggest a plan instead.

items.title: No double-booking
items.description: Your appointment is yours — we don't juggle three clients per chair.

items.title: Quality products
items.description: We use and sell only products we'd put on our own hair.

items.title: Evening hours
items.description: Open until 20:00 on weekdays, so you don't have to skip work.

gallery.title: Recent work
gallery.subtitle: A few looks from the past months.

items.name: Jelena D.
items.text: Mila is the first hairdresser who told me NOT to do something I asked for — and she was right. My hair has never been healthier.

items.name: Tamara S.
items.text: The trial run before the wedding took all the stress away. On the day everything was done in 40 minutes and held until 3 AM.

items.name: Ivana & Sara
items.text: We've both been coming for years. The prices are fair and nobody ever pushes products on you.

pricing.title: Price list
pricing.subtitle: Final price depends on hair length and condition — we confirm before starting.

plans.name: Color & cut
plans.description: Full color or root touch-up with a cut and blow-dry.

plans.name: Balayage
plans.description: Balayage or highlights with toner and treatment.

plans.name: Occasion styling
plans.description: Updo or styling for weddings and events.

items.question: How do I book?
items.answer: Call or send a message — we confirm within a few hours. For color appointments, book at least a week ahead; cuts can usually fit within a day or two.

items.question: Do you take walk-ins?
items.answer: When a chair is free, gladly — but appointments always have priority, so it's safer to message first.

items.question: I want a big color change. What should I expect?
items.answer: Come in for a free 10-minute consultation first. Big changes sometimes need two sessions to keep your hair healthy, and we'll tell you the realistic plan and full price upfront.

items.question: What if I'm not happy with the result?
items.answer: Tell us within a week and we'll fix it free of charge. It almost never happens — the consultation is exactly for that.

cta.title: Ready for a change?
cta.subtitle: Book an appointment or come in for a free consultation.

contact.title: Find us
contact.subtitle: In the centre, two minutes from the main square.

footer.description: Hair salon in the centre of Novi Sad.
